prose:
Frontier-orbital energies for pyridine computed at the DFT level, tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP), using PySCF RKS. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied .xyz file (single-point; not re-optimised at this level). Density fitting was OFF (exact four-centre integrals). SCF converged in 10 cycles. No warnings reported; all integrity checks passed (integrity.trustworthy = true).

Key results:
  HOMO  (index 20): −7.2525992 eV
  LUMO  (index 21): −1.112786  eV
  HOMO–LUMO gap   :  6.1398131 eV  ← headline value

Additional frontier orbitals:
  HOMO−2 (index 18): −8.0425195 eV
  HOMO−1 (index 19): −7.4731156 eV
  LUMO+1 (index 22): −0.67231536 eV
  LUMO+2 (index 23): +1.1781069 eV

Koopmans-derived descriptors:
  Vertical IP          = 7.2525992 eV
  Vertical EA          = 1.112786  eV
  Electronegativity χ  = 4.1826926 eV
  Chemical hardness η  = 3.0699066 eV
  Chemical softness S  = 0.32574281 eV⁻¹
  Electrophilicity ω   = 2.8494218 eV

CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1
